candidates.why: Candidate is the standard top-line revenue label, but this sheet contains duplicate 'Total Revenue' rows, one blank and one populated, making the exact row ambiguous.

variables.notes: Used 'Net Sales' from the full preview because it is the clear populated top-line revenue row and avoids ambiguity from duplicate 'Total Revenue' labels on the sheet. Candidate list misses this more precise/unique label. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Net Sales

candidates.why: Direct cost line immediately below revenue; standard COGS label.
Also a valid COGS label, but appears duplicative of 'Cost of sales' with identical values.

variables.notes: Preferred 'Cost of sales' over the duplicate-like 'Cost of revenues/COGS'.

candidates.why: Explicit SG&A row, populated, and therefore should be selected per hierarchy.
Separate above-EBIT R&D line; included in XSGA_COMPONENTS as well so that XSGA_COMPONENTS - XRD yields SG&A excluding R&D.
Overhead-like, but lower priority because explicit SG&A exists and totals/components should not be over-expanded unnecessarily.
Could be overhead-related, but explicit SG&A exists and this supplemental disclosure should not replace the direct SG&A line.

variables.notes: Selected explicit SG&A row. Also included separate above-EBIT R&D line so the PROF formula's subtraction of XRD removes R&D and leaves SG&A ex-R&D.

candidates.why: Dedicated above-EBIT R&D expense line.
Tax credit adjustment, not the core R&D expense line.
Amortization, not current-period R&D expense.
Depreciation component, not the main R&D expense line.

variables.notes: Dedicated R&D expense line appears above operating profit.

candidates.why: Most direct and preferred interest expense line.
Broader finance-cost line; useful fallback if interest expense label changes.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Only a component of total interest expense, so not preferred as primary mapping.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental component only.
Balancing line, not preferred.

variables.notes: Priority list uses the direct interest expense line first, then broader financial expenses as fallback.

candidates.why: Best available balance-sheet equity line that appears to exclude non-controlling interests, since 'Total equity' equals this plus NCI.
Includes non-controlling interests and would risk double counting with MIB.
Only one component of equity, not total book equity.
Semantically valid but appears unpopulated/less specific than 'Total shareholders equity'.
Income statement profit attribution line, not book equity.

candidates.row_label: Fair value loss on equity investment
candidates.why: Not equity.

variables.notes: Chosen because it appears to exclude non-controlling interests; 'Total equity' would double count when MIB is added.

candidates.why: Standard balance-sheet NCI line.
Equivalent balance-sheet label; fallback if needed.
Income statement profit attribution, not balance-sheet minority equity.
Income statement attribution item, not balance-sheet minority equity.
Not the balance-sheet NCI stock.

variables.notes: Priority list includes both equivalent balance-sheet labels in case reporting label changes over time.
